title: Mycobacterium tuberculosis (Zopf, 1883) Lehmann & Neumann
author: Li, Da-Wei
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: 2.2. Inhibitory effects of compounds 1–15 on Mycobacterium tuberculosis    The inhibitory effect of isolated diterpenoids against  M. tuberculosis  H37Ra was evaluated using resazurin as the staining reagent. As a result, no  M. tuberculosis  bacterial cells were observed for co-incubation with compounds  6–8  at 50 μM, which indicated their MIC values. The other diterpenoids could not thoroughly inhibit the proliferation of  M. tuberculosis  at 100 μM.
